lessons.title: Uniform Convergence: First Intuition
lessons.description: A small interactive introduction using f_n(x)=x^n on [0,1).

lessons.title: Fourier Series: Building Waves from Sines
lessons.description: Explore partial sums, coefficient decay, and the Gibbs phenomenon.

lessons.title: Discrete Fourier Transform: Signals as Frequency Bins
lessons.description: Edit a short signal and see how the DFT splits it into frequency content.

lessons.title: Transformer Attention: One Toy Head
lessons.description: Drag Q, K, and V basis vectors to see scores, softmax weights, and value mixing.

lessons.title: Convolution: Sliding Weighted Sums
lessons.description: Slide a small kernel across a signal and watch local products accumulate.

lessons.title: Gradient Descent: Following the Slope
lessons.description: Drag a starting point on a contour plot and watch iterative updates descend.
